title: Wadaa' fi elfagr
writer: El Sayed Bedeir, Hasan El-Emam, Kamal El-Shinnawi
actors: Kamal El-Shinnawi, Abdel Moneim Ibrahim, Hosni Mubarak
plot: Ahmad is an air-force fighter who lives with his rich father who wants him to marry partner's daughter; but he falls in love with Zainab, the poor distant relative, and marries her despite of his father's disapproval. Soon, Ahmad lea
